# MeNutrition

> MeNutrition is an iOS app (free download with a trial; optional auto-renewing subscription) that reads any restaurant menu or home-cooked meal by camera and instantly shows calories, macros, and micronutrients. It translates menus in 21 languages and tracks your day against a personalized calorie budget.

## What it does
- Scan a restaurant menu: every dish labeled with estimated calories *before you order*.
- Snap a home plate: calories, protein/fat/carbs, and vitamins of the portion — no manual logging.
- Menu translation in 21 languages for eating out abroad.
- Personalized daily calorie target from your body and activity (via Apple Health).
- Diet and allergen filtering (vegetarian, vegan, keto, gluten-free, and more).
- Voice/text meal logging, water and weight tracking.

## Platform & pricing
- iOS (iPhone). Free to download with a free trial; premium features via subscription.
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/cy/app/menutrition-meal-calorie-ai/id6767123368

## Links
- Home: https://menutrition.app
- Privacy Policy: https://menutrition.app/privacy
- Terms of Use: https://menutrition.app/terms
